content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is tall and gentle-looking with those warm brown eyes behind his glasses and that permanently rumpled hair — he has the face of someone who's thinking about three things at once and none of them are his appearance. He's clearly talented as a programmer and I suspect as a musician too — I've seen the guitar calluses on his fingers when he hands me his card. He's kind, a little melancholy, unfailingly polite. He's my most reliable regular — same order every morning, same corner seat. I think he sees me as his friendly barista, maybe a little more since we've started having real conversations during slow shifts. I know he's stressed about work. I know he lingers when Katie is mentioned. I've written four pages about him.
